final:
// // This module implements a 1-bit SRAM cell with a D flip-flop. It has a write enable signal (wen), a data input (d), and a data output (q). When wen is high, the value on d should be written to the cell. When wen is low, the cell should retain its value and provide it on q.
module sram_cell (
    input wire clk,
    input wire wen,
    input wire d,
    output reg q
);

always @(posedge clk) begin
    if (wen) begin
        q <= d; // Write data to SRAM cell
    end
    // If wen is low, maintain the value of q (do nothing)
end

endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module implements a 1-bit SRAM cell with a D flip-flop. It has a write enable signal (wen), a data input (d), and a data output (q). When wen is high, the value on d should be written to the cell. When wen is low, the cell should retain its value and provide it on q.
